content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Wellness Clinic Marketing: Senior SDR Anywhere in the World Florida Sales, Lead Qualification, Relationship Building, and Sales Analytics Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5859/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> MIami USA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.wellnessclinicmarketing.com/">https://www.wellnessclinicmarketing.com/</a> </p> <p>We're a marketing agency serving medical spas, HRT, and wellness clinics. We need a driven SDR who can turn leads into booked Discovery Calls fast.</p> <p><strong>What you'll do</strong></p> <p>Work three pipelines daily: engage inbound leads from paid campaigns (speed matters), reactivate cold database contacts, and prospect new clinics via calls, SMS, and email. Every touchpoint has one goal — book a qualified Discovery Call with a Sales Closer.</p> <p><strong>Your core responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Qualify and prioritize leads before outreach (clinic type, size, fit)</p> </li> <li> <p>Execute structured multi-channel cadences: Call → SMS → Voicemail → Email</p> </li> <li> <p>Confirm decision-maker status and clinic readiness before booking</p> </li> <li> <p>Maintain clean, accurate CRM records after every interaction</p> </li> <li> <p>Transfer warm leads live when possible</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>How you'll be measured</strong></p> <p>Discovery Calls booked per week is your primary KPI, alongside contact rate, conversation-to-booking conversion, and inbound speed-to-lead.</p> <p><strong>What we're looking for</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Proven SDR, sales, or lead gen experience</p> </li> <li> <p>B2 level minimum, C2 level preferred. Strong English communication skills required, as you’ll be speaking directly with U.S. clinic owners.</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable with high daily outreach volume across multiple channels</p> </li> <li> <p>CRM-proficient and process-disciplined</p> </li> <li> <p>Medspa / wellness / healthcare background is a strong plus</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wellness-clinic-marketing-senior-sdr">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wellness-clinic-marketing-senior-sdr</a></p> Fri, 17 Jul 2026 16:58:38 +0000 Sun, 16 Aug 2026 16:58:38 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wellness-clinic-marketing-senior-sdr https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wellness-clinic-marketing-senior-sdr garden3d: Head of Design Anywhere in the World New York Design Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/4271/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York City <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://garden3d.net/">https://garden3d.net/</a> </p> <p>We are hiring a <strong>Head of Design</strong> for the garden3d creative collective, to uphold an exceedingly high bar on every single thing we make</p> <p>More details if you check our&nbsp;<a href="https://app.notion.com/p/garden3d/Head-of-Design-39d131fea2c781b3953af7d310a53bc2?source=copy_link">original job posting link</a></p> <h3><strong>About <a href="https://garden3d.net/">garden3d</a></strong></h3> <p>We are worker owned creative collective, innovating on everything from brands and IRL communities to IoT devices and cross platform apps. We share profit, open source everything, spin out new businesses, and invest in exciting ideas through financial and/or in-kind contributions.</p> <p>Our client roster includes&nbsp;<a href="https://www.google.com/">Google</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://stripe.com/">Stripe</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.figma.com/">Figma</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://hinge.co/">Hinge</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://blacksocialists.us/">Black Socialists in America</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.aclu.org/">ACLU</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.pratt.edu/">Pratt</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.newschool.edu/parsons/">Parsons</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/">Mozilla</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.nobelprize.org/">The Nobel Prize</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.mit.edu/">MIT</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gnosis.io/">Gnosis</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.etsy.com/">Etsy</a>&nbsp;&amp;&nbsp;<a href="https://gagosian.com/">Gagosian</a>.</p> <p>We’re the software team behind innovative products like&nbsp;<a href="https://www.thelightphone.com/">The Light Phone</a>&nbsp;&amp;&nbsp;<a href="https://www.mill.com/">Mill</a>, and we operate a global, decentralized community space collective called&nbsp;<a href="https://www.index-space.org/">Index Space</a>.</p> <p>We think of our garden3d as collective for creative people, prioritizing a happy, talented, and diverse studio culture. We work on projects that bring value to our world, and we balance deep care for the work we do with a genuine curiosity about life outside of our jobs.</p> <p><strong>Sanctuary Computer</strong>&nbsp;— Development</p> <p>At&nbsp;<a href="https://www.sanctuary.computer/">Sanctuary Computer</a>&nbsp;we’re building a different type of technology shop – one that prioritizes close collaboration between the client and the craftsperson.</p> <p>Our projects range from design-forward websites, to robust web apps, to native mobile development.</p> <p><strong>XXIX</strong>&nbsp;— Design</p> <p>When we started&nbsp;<a href="https://www.xxix.co/">XXIX</a>&nbsp;in 2013, we set out to create a different kind of design studio and we’ve thrived because we continually ask what a creative practice can be.</p> <p>We’re building a radically different kind of organization that values autonomy, growth, transparency, and shared responsibility.</p> <p><strong>Index Space</strong>&nbsp;— Community</p> <p>A network of physical spaces all around the world,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.index-space.org/">Index</a>&nbsp;provides space for the exchange of knowledge and tools.</p> <p>We nurture trust within the creative community through generosity and abundance of ideas and care.</p> <p><a href="https://garden3d.substack.com/"><strong>garden3d TK</strong></a>&nbsp;— Media</p> <p>At garden3d, we’re in the early stages of building an experimental media company exploring emerging themes related to the evolving landscape of technology, design and culture.</p> <p>We aim to monetize this outlet, publish books, produce screenplays, and release music.</p> <p>Plus, our partner organizations<br><a href="https://www.thelightphone.
